name: Nick Freitas
subject: Important update
body:
Friend, Thank you. I know the last election cycle did not turn out the way we wanted, but I want you to know how grateful that my family and I are for all of the support you gave us. I can’t tell you how hard it is for me to ask for help. I like to be the one providing assistance, not asking for it, but you responded to our call in our congressional race, and I am very grateful. Like you, I have watched in frustration as more and more of our fellow citizens have bought into the false narrative that if only the government had more control, more power, they would take care of us. The defining feature of the American experiment is not government power but individual liberty and personal responsibility. The marvel of American success is not found in the corridors of political power but in the right of each individual to carve out their own path. We have to restore that confidence in our youth if we are going to preserve a free society. Running for Congress and serving in the Virginia House of Delegates has provided me an opportunity to speak with people across the country, and I am convinced that we must fight as hard for the culture as we do within the political realm. From a young age, our children are being taught a narrative about who we are as a people that directly contradicts historical reality. It is equally infuriating and heartbreaking to see a young man or woman in the United States convinced that their future is tied not to their own creativity, work ethic, and abilities but a government program. Cultural institutions, from our schools to the media to the arts and entertainment, reinforce a self-destructive narrative that freedom is a burden rather than a blessing. A narrative that suggests that one’s circumstances at birth are insurmountable and that conditions such as poverty can only be alleviated through direct government intervention carried out by politicians that have “our best interests in mind.” We know where this failed narrative leads, and we are beginning to see the effects. Somewhere along the line, I believe we assumed that we had won the larger argument. I’m old enough to remember the disintegration of the Soviet Union, the fall of the Berlin Wall and hearing the stories of those who had fled or were liberated from such regimes. Growing up, it seemed so obvious that those countries which embraced individual liberty and free markets produced superior results, not only economically but morally. I now realize that for generations of Americans whose only exposure to the brutality of collectivist ideologies is a college classroom or a Hollywood narrative, the failure of such ideologies is not apparent. _**So, what do we do? The only way to defeat a bad idea is with a good one. **_ So that is what I am doing. Because of the audience that you helped me build in 2020, we are now using our platform to share the stories, knowledge, and arguments that effectively explain the power of individual liberty and free markets. We are now hosting [“](http://links.nickforva.com/u/click?_t=1288bb27b50344f7a99321d594ffc386&_m=cdb6e537618a49caa010db9ea1d7f0f5&_e=kUkbCTr4zlyV0x766Lp8p4vHgdRiRM2OdDjK_es8_JTs8V5I2wHw7RY5JWjfoxv9EbxTOgMDYEQ0C7v36TEHsLWjK7RpW2q8hcM5WRga7WVwHfeVbnebVm4OhO_mNOMH-gNp81Nh4VhmP8K35EOmymGi4KZ7mUJowEhktr3DnAFHZRGy1bwRjWMsgh33ogPiKLAIYK-CVbUxyQqztM94z7MFC41KgR5T5bdmegVA1rUmuklpCaMLvBwTgFiee3VHV42bzUfXs9OG2z6zjBp4EE2tfuc7rSnPGqfYu8uXeAl74_s_aqTwsM0pgr2OyTn8) _[The Why Minutes.”](http://links.nickforva.com/u/click?_t=1288bb27b50344f7a99321d594ffc386&_m=cdb6e537618a49caa010db9ea1d7f0f5&_e=kUkbCTr4zlyV0x766Lp8p4vHgdRiRM2OdDjK_es8_JTs8V5I2wHw7RY5JWjfoxv9EbxTOgMDYEQ0C7v36TEHsFaDQeiDa5jMXn8KHLiZYpcqLpA_y3RL3iTd-EdIBs-dLHy8ee6nFLEOSf4KdfVKgphrYwWUTSnSRSC8MW2svkxcO-NBKqFUgwehNvkLrXzBiYV4l3asdgeujWo8XPh5mduNS0-9eL0TsItlhQRqQbp44FAr2lbOwdybiy0Akx_6fTdBWIVZ_jLipgyGOsZ5pTOXu9WyTlc-1sfRdAkTTkiA5T68x9Cqqg5jJ-gMfqVu)_ In this project, we tackle some of the most pressing issues and assumptions on a wide range of culturally relevant topics and use stories and examples which make BOTH a logical and emotional appeal. The purpose of this project is to appeal to those who have not necessarily formed a fixed opinion and to provide them with entertaining and “shareable” content that highlights the benefits of a free society and challenges the narrative that government power and coercion is the best or most effective way to solve problems in a free society. [](http://links.nickforva.com/u/click?_t=1288bb27b50344f7a99321d594ffc386&_m=cdb6e537618a49caa010db9ea1d7f0f5&_e=kUkbCTr4zlyV0x766Lp8p4vHgdRiRM2OdDjK_es8_JTs8V5I2wHw7RY5JWjfoxv9EbxTOgMDYEQ0C7v36TEHsPsdCOkExXbNlITwL4A7OpKmjZhcNJYTwxucVBe0hM62MeDnIG2XecOWwCqC8Ti7tUX36-ue5i2ENWz1vh9HIhGcq3B4irjiVdSCGXa7j2HpIVwwW8X9hZIKiRmIV9u-aDhs0NijwDB_eY3yHqeJr2cjk0wg1ZGSm4V2AllAh7LEVg-foRWEFDb0Z9bDomTtcvqohHgyGTKWJm1N9gHzF7TQpoIcYPUbHacis-CexvOA) We have new videos going out every Wednesday, and our first video performed incredibly well as we shared the story of the [most successful tunnel escape in the history of the Berlin Wall](http://links.nickforva.com/u/click?_t=1288bb27b50344f7a99321d594ffc386&_m=cdb6e537618a49caa010db9ea1d7f0f5&_e=kUkbCTr4zlyV0x766Lp8p16pXCuzZD9w80GlFY6q8oddfBi0l4psBboxkoiMKWmSQ0zQHIgec0x9peqVrDfx4VMWZULfQVLYMfgZpWcs1kv_zQNob5XDDXol_8paaBl5u8tbcPd3EJfH3QFJThKaaSAXRpQwRYqPvuH5_JjhRGOC3cbE89e-3CNoqayBMW9BvTmSIHB2WPKZS5Wn1UOXdVU2fO8mIOcMIQJRxKYSoK0YNie6RyCdCC1rA6hgxz9WEp9fKdAj7MKRCRbRdW5-fg%3D%3D). In this story, we asked why people who were being provided “free” healthcare, education, a place to live, and a guaranteed job literally risk death and imprisonment to escape to a country that only offered you the right to pursue happiness. In a world where so many in politics are trying to convince us that “freedom” is the government provision of things, as opposed to your right to pursue your own path, the story of those living under such a regime highlights the vacuous nature of such a promise and the lengths people would go to escape it. **[In just the first episode, The Why Minutes reached over 642,000 people with the powerful story I mentioned above.](http://links.nickforva.com/u/click?_t=1288bb27b50344f7a99321d594ffc386&_m=cdb6e537618a49caa010db9ea1d7f0f5&_e=kUkbCTr4zlyV0x766Lp8p16pXCuzZD9w80GlFY6q8oddfBi0l4psBboxkoiMKWmSS9hZtCDTdQ2j-MpedQjr7iKyH4K2ugdLYZtJrSb6XEWXePMJVmstlLmPG12EDYS3Py6gMw11kV85Eg1eZR0O8ZmRg9aFQT-Aab1RYF2hv-eF88cYbvX7axVz1_iXSJ2eXCBjoEL460misFifujTfJqeEu70_1xGEIA3sLxpk1LP8EYbM3uJ5pzNlETwCL1MHCs69NhaEGHQ-EfRNq6ciJw%3D%3D)** Read what a few Facebook commentators had to say about this episode: I have also been commissioned to continue our podcast, [“Making the Argument.”](http://links.nickforva.com/u/click?_t=1288bb27b50344f7a99321d594ffc386&_m=cdb6e537618a49caa010db9ea1d7f0f5&_e=kUkbCTr4zlyV0x766Lp8p4vHgdRiRM2OdDjK_es8_JRkKJ9s11UmezMf-zw9QujU2e0RnUJwZv5C9OGFltYNmh8sSuIw9QIuCkFD24O6hFT-7MIzM_9ymfxk59gKCRESNt1KeVJpAjkQH4eK-cwUWolP9uYdDO72A2D-0yUy_hfLPW08xdMHVxTJ9hm68imuHDX-0yQ-Too_VVSS0REJVjlqfTnFDqArfRe2uXr2ulo9a1A-zZWR4tYUEsaAeDAHcvw7DDCnfgnNRq5z0K4BCJRc5BUR_uczVBU2K9FMbwE-iyeQLBecl2IZuv8udaez) Twice a week, we tackle questions on politics, economics, and popular culture and equip people to make an effective argument for individual liberty and free markets. In a recent episode, we discussed how the [Welfare State](http://links.nickforva.com/u/click?_t=1288bb27b50344f7a99321d594ffc386&_m=cdb6e537618a49caa010db9ea1d7f0f5&_e=kUkbCTr4zlyV0x766Lp8p8Q4ArYAgPEw1HuHr9QpfqOJ5gbSq715fmSTNmBLzY_tJLXo640pN2jC1yovRiOM5HMlQs6Fe1shgqfwV1kBAKq9cTGVd7_LtxaGFjOFgS8f4X85TUAzPXAKTZeBVOQbP4b2txDaB31sCQuzN7dkmOqGrfTq4LsUpO7NP6p8P9dFpJWQxQceblDi9viSKQqTMLrNFPH-JP0X1t6HuLOqYZ4s24FszK8BSWxXaTrrQcHP7rGpzzXKx1yUDkmmBDMpZneDC7CcLAKZc7EA-B0mHIMqn-59xJH3vcZvvf9z9pxv3dqIn2VAo3D8GyT8VHEAfn2ssK3o7-uYTPqeHcBP08yNZrwXQCUAVHYAvStnrIPe) hurts those it proposes to help, highlighting the important work done by Dr. Anthony Daniels and his book “Life at the Bottom, the worldview that creates the underclass.” [](http://links.nickforva.com/u/click?_t=1288bb27b50344f7a99321d594ffc386&_m=cdb6e537618a49caa010db9ea1d7f0f5&_e=kUkbCTr4zlyV0x766Lp8p4vHgdRiRM2OdDjK_es8_JRkKJ9s11UmezMf-zw9QujU2e0RnUJwZv5C9OGFltYNmsAfLeR8fh-Lc3MRBek8EnsWkG-__iMYXzrlt8OVdXsPM7JKfepba7qFdoyZPixwqFIX8oDe0csXapJ81ptKgWrZrAnw980p3sYcR3VgvXfEmKse1I-VNYG3AILSZZcCRZfxPjUgRgfCffhDnk4p-g6KEz6nivsUqkJN2eM4qJs-tGC01uywy-X7tacgN-7AqhyBpO3kGSgZ-yojx8bdjqB-67NAle_6Bn8y4nXp2--k) I want you to know that I am not only grateful for the support that you have provided but that I am going to build on what you did to continue to fight. I am excited about these opportunities. I am confident that continuing to find new ways to engage with people is critical to combatting the narrative that is continually being pushed in our schools, the media, and Hollywood. My hope is that you will watch, listen, and share these videos and podcasts so that we can extend our reach. I understand with everything that is going on in our country right now; it is easy to become discouraged. But one thing I have learned in combat as well as politics is that while cowardice is contagious... so is courage. And when you are the first person over the ramparts, you will be shocked at how many people will come with you. I am asking you to come with me. Thank you, Nick Freitas P.S. If you would like to receive an email from me each week with the newest Why Minute video, please let me know by signing up here: _[TheWhyMinutes.com](TheWhyMinutes.com)_.
---
This email was sent to [dpwillis67@gmail.com](mailto:dpwillis67@gmail.com). Don't want to receive these emails anymore? [Unsubscribe](http://links.nickforva.com/e/encryptedUnsubscribe?_r=1288bb27b50344f7a99321d594ffc386&_s=cdb6e537618a49caa010db9ea1d7f0f5&_t=jTsR-9a-DCTOR1mzjEvmouCk07DqIu12O_jdvXZJQKnPQ9rJAzautlkkkXM7w_fiV04KtBJVnlnWTK-74mWyeR05BhQg6AKrPhXEBF7eKjzCRvxNV743uAQhdasi7GOMuJsRSm-Hgrv_Zuu-2cyGjnYSREArzeDHrgd9Aagqy5s%3D)
---
Nick Freitas, P.O. Box 1000

body:

Joe Biden has gotten so many things wrong in his first 6 weeks as President. Read this week about one thing I think he's gotten right. [Read this entry >>](https://start.rightmailer.net/t/r-l-tllukkid-kujkulhluu-t/)

The Foreign Affairs Subcommittee on Asia and the Pacific has jurisdiction over half the earth's surface and more than half the world's population. I was just named the Lead Republican (Ranking Member) of the committee in the upcoming Congress. China will be a particular focus of attention. You can read about it in this week's blog. [Read this entry >>](https://start.rightmailer.net/t/r-l-tllukkid-kujkulhluu-o/) [](https://start.rightmailer.net/t/r-l-tllukkid-kujkulhluu-b/)

name: Giffords.org
subject: Give me a chance to explain
body:
This is our best opportunity to create national change in a long time.
#

Friends -
In just a moment, we are going to ask you to make a contribution to help advance the fight to make our communities safer from gun violence. Please give us a chance to explain why this request is so important.
Over the last decade, the politics of gun safety have shifted dramatically in our favor, and now we have a new president.
This is our best opportunity to create **_national_** change in a long time. And whatever happens next, our organization Giffords, and Gabby specifically, will be at the forefront of that fight.
So today, we are kicking off a 72-Hour fundraising drive so we are ready for what comes next. This could be our moment, and we need to be ready. So we are asking:
**[Can you make a $3 donation to Giffords PAC as part of our 72-Hour Fundraising Drive to help Gabby lead the fight to change our gun laws during the Biden Administration? Gabby cannot do this alone.](https://action.giffords.org/page/m/385ee1f4/78fba3aa/60cb34c9/50aaceba/3741623893/VEsH/p/eyJlM3R5WldaamIyUmxmWDA9IjoiZW0yMTAzMDQtMS1udGwifQ%3D%3D/?g=VoprG3y8bT5gPy-pvV0V7pA "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/giffords-em-march-21?refcode=em210304-1-ntl")**
Gabby has long said the struggle would not be easy, and that success would not come fast. But everything we've done over the course of the past 8 years has led to this moment. And if we can make the most of it, we can save lives.
Thanks for chipping in,
Team Giffords
**[CONTRIBUTE](https://action.giffords.org/page/m/385ee1f4/78fba3aa/60cb34c9/50aaceba/3741623893/VEsE/p/eyJlM3R5WldaamIyUmxmWDA9IjoiZW0yMTAzMDQtMS1udGwifQ%3D%3D/?g=VoprG3y8bT5gPy-pvV0V7pA "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/giffords-em-march-21?refcode=em210304-1-ntl")**

* * *
This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. We try to send only the most important information and opportunities to participate via email, but click [here](https://action.giffords.org/page/m/385ee1f4/78fba3aa/60cb34c9/50aacebd/3741623893/VEsF/?g=VoprG3y8bT5gPy-pvV0V7pA "http://action.americansforresponsiblesolutions.org/page/unsubscribe") if you'd like to unsubscribe. Giffords PAC was started to support elected officials who step up to fight the gun violence epidemic. Thank you for standing with Gabby and Mark.
clean_body: This is our best opportunity to create national change in a long time. Friends - In just a moment, we are going to ask you to make a contribution to help advance the fight to make our communities safer from gun violence. Please give us a chance to explain why this request is so important. Over the last decade, the politics of gun safety have shifted dramatically in our favor, and now we have a new president. This is our best opportunity to create national change in a long time. And whatever happens next, our organization Giffords, and Gabby specifically, will be at the forefront of that fight. So today, we are kicking off a 72-Hour fundraising drive so we are ready for what comes next. This could be our moment, and we need to be ready. So we are asking: "" Gabby has long said the struggle would not be easy, and that success would not come fast. But everything we've done over the course of the past 8 years has led to this moment. And if we can make the most of it, we can save lives. Thanks for chipping in, Team Giffords "" *

name: Team Cheney
subject: What Democrats don’t want you to know
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Liz Cheney for Wyoming
body:
We can't allow the Democrats to destroy the things that make our country great

Friend,
We can't allow the Democrats to destroy the things that make our country great. Right now Speaker Pelosi is trying to take over our American election process and put the federal government in charge.__

If Pelosi and Democrats are successful they could:
* **Seize the authority of states** to regulate voter registration
* Hurt voter turnout and **make it easier to commit fraud**
* **Open the door for cyber criminals** and hackers to interfere in our elections
* **Expand government censorship of campaigns and political activity**

Democrats are deliberately interfering with our election process to hinder Republicans from success. [**We cannot allow this to happen. Will you help STOP Speaker Pelosi 's power grabbing agenda?**](http://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001t_JfLhQC2FQqUC0MBEZ3OAJW0Rw4ejKT9i8Uil0JuBC6dTy1zbfX4ZPpxIp_MxmyXO8hxFm8CJLJosIxPYFmsmWmnzKmSE4QWajIrWITSnGYEasgDff3miVRZjeFSwxCQ6TrHjDPMfVqiz3zV-io2JnLXXNgJJNkVwVEQf3-QSPFdtDfKFpkzpMP8R0gSJY59ZmPAEx9iiX1gkPGvuC0HzHN-Uqlt3dv8wnoNam8rkja0amWX89ehBWa3iCM-qttXYXS2SHf87lmZh6HHLL5bz8Q2ln3DVUXlkh1aHXkJxvIYPcVL6fIxtvivp9Wf0cbUpBA7xVOwdo-c3Ez1IjZwKFEUGw3OiMe5CfiH2SfLNHOhjUM1baVAnX9MEKqxFbjQORCnhzLcf_HrQNYKpG-npsf-fX6pK8vevx1NverZM4GeyihZOQzywe2OZbKBTkW&c=t8p58M4ZduexP308tuecHBcw9VZfjHrc6TUESTjx423t4XzyhRGakg==&ch=1cqQSV0tQeYju0vfMe4RZ_RNdBql-jmytNEO5rLQg6iNfHQIO6eDUw==)

What is the Republican State Leadership Committee (RSLC)?
The Republican State Leadership Committee (RSLC) isn't just another alphabet soup political committee. We're the largest caucus of Republican state leaders in the nation with one unified goal: winning. Through innovative strategies and record-breaking support across all 50 states, we recruit, train, and support Republicans to state offices. Following a historically successful 2020 election cycle, state Republicans currently hold 62 of 99 state legislative chambers, 25 of 45 lieutenant governor seats, 28 of 50 secretary of state offices, and 11 of 12 independently-elected agriculture officials -- thanks in large part to the support from patriots like you. You can learn more about us at [rslc.gop](http://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001j43IzTea77MJYo9E8TxvTnQxT5CFaaCPe43T1BNq_V_jB3ZR-DjqebWMDtDaGkLRhJuVaaU4uAyCbDuZ4wgLNJE5SWjPT_NXFmJqps_qBsT2WIk_raoNsH58zoxUIkTKvFUvy0U4LK4=&c=UkLa8chWjPdc9kxdQ1w-gwYu8IwNWBxVVx3xfy4QDYvc1xzF2ZM52g==&ch=dd6locRJ_Om0SnCLSMNz8BdVNCMaVmZxrBP9Jdrgt1ZEdDaTX3jJfg==).

body:
|

| | |
If we start getting to work NOW for the 2022 Elections, this could be the headline November 9, 2022:
|
**" SENATE FLIPS TO REPUBLICAN CONTROL"** November 9, 2022

---

You've seen what the Democrats have been doing to take our country back to the Obama era, and we can't afford another TWO years of this! We can stop the Biden-Harris administration, but only if we WIN. **Are you with us, Friend?**

| | [TAKE BACK THE SENATE](http://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=0018mLMFizt6Po4_H3dFR1JV8WHb9CdUrrzZWXt74ZzQINvMnviguXiOk1GUJXiZl1K6QsNiWYwcFnyKiGDCxQqGRx28FRJMxj27QJiCTAVdXJX2rj-ISChYjPD33LT4Hup640w-VyyLEcR0XEicYn1FRQ6Ma22K73_knjdY5WfVz69zAJnxtj9o_fgzuKD5HcgCe0uDQlciCLA3cq1BLyW5LylW9ybjqaUlYO4dpjAzm8C01AmOcOE4prmRazxBAF7puY2sGRtAHQvljATr7htCUtcNtmR3JZFgd7uecU27aLJxwqw-MKbA1MhHbxaQujfP_O79JXEvCUOzpOy8vrAayUtRaoMnU_O9ADhBmsdxLyMXbmNitOafYHiHr3kNQtP9wCay0PM3L1sACA4fBU7qhVI1QFktfomcz647Fra9hwRaVL_1g95TYhjYpVpYQGj&c=0yMsdmvVRNaIjceOqKiIaJ1UAWLkAI5tCeOcdoMIRS30QyK-bU9-pA==&ch=rbsLVn8qsWF0MIdGUcaHXRdQt6gnzHbziLfbY61tJxqbfLUmp7CpFg== "TAKE BACK THE SENATE")

The Senate is currently tied at **50 Democrats to 50 Republicans ... And Kamala Harris is the tie-breaking vote.** What this means is that the stakes have truly NEVER been higher. We can't afford to lose a single seat, or we're toast. **[BUT, with your help today, you can make sure that doesn't happen: Donate to help us take back the Senate and put a stop to Joe Biden, Kamala Harris, Chuck Schumer, and Nancy Pelosi having TOTAL power!](http://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=0018mLMFizt6Po4_H3dFR1JV8WHb9CdUrrzZWXt74ZzQINvMnviguXiOk1GUJXiZl1K6QsNiWYwcFnyKiGDCxQqGRx28FRJMxj27QJiCTAVdXJX2rj-ISChYjPD33LT4Hup640w-VyyLEcR0XEicYn1FRQ6Ma22K73_knjdY5WfVz69zAJnxtj9o_fgzuKD5HcgCe0uDQlciCLA3cq1BLyW5LylW9ybjqaUlYO4dpjAzm8C01AmOcOE4prmRazxBAF7puY2sGRtAHQvljATr7htCUtcNtmR3JZFgd7uecU27aLJxwqw-MKbA1MhHbxaQujfP_O79JXEvCUOzpOy8vrAayUtRaoMnU_O9ADhBmsdxLyMXbmNitOafYHiHr3kNQtP9wCay0PM3L1sACA4fBU7qhVI1QFktfomcz647Fra9hwRaVL_1g95TYhjYpVpYQGj&c=0yMsdmvVRNaIjceOqKiIaJ1UAWLkAI5tCeOcdoMIRS30QyK-bU9-pA==&ch=rbsLVn8qsWF0MIdGUcaHXRdQt6gnzHbziLfbY61tJxqbfLUmp7CpFg== "BUT, with your help today, you can make sure that doesn’t happen: Donate to help us take back the Senate and put a stop to Joe Biden, Kamala Harris, Chuck Schumer, and Nancy Pelosi having TOTAL power!")**

The Democrats have spent the last 2 months focused on an impeachment motivated by political vengeance, killing American jobs, and allowing China to skate by. Can you imagine what they'll do with another 2 years? **We need to start TODAY to take back the Senate and stop the Democrats:**

---
| | [TAKE BACK THE SENATE](http://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=0018mLMFizt6Po4_H3dFR1JV8WHb9CdUrrzZWXt74ZzQINvMnviguXiOk1GUJXiZl1K6QsNiWYwcFnyKiGDCxQqGRx28FRJMxj27QJiCTAVdXJX2rj-ISChYjPD33LT4Hup640w-VyyLEcR0XEicYn1FRQ6Ma22K73_knjdY5WfVz69zAJnxtj9o_fgzuKD5HcgCe0uDQlciCLA3cq1BLyW5LylW9ybjqaUlYO4dpjAzm8C01AmOcOE4prmRazxBAF7puY2sGRtAHQvljATr7htCUtcNtmR3JZFgd7uecU27aLJxwqw-MKbA1MhHbxaQujfP_O79JXEvCUOzpOy8vrAayUtRaoMnU_O9ADhBmsdxLyMXbmNitOafYHiHr3kNQtP9wCay0PM3L1sACA4fBU7qhVI1QFktfomcz647Fra9hwRaVL_1g95TYhjYpVpYQGj&c=0yMsdmvVRNaIjceOqKiIaJ1UAWLkAI5tCeOcdoMIRS30QyK-bU9-pA==&ch=rbsLVn8qsWF0MIdGUcaHXRdQt6gnzHbziLfbY61tJxqbfLUmp7CpFg== "TAKE BACK THE SENATE")

We know it's early, but the Democrats are well on their way to holding onto their total control. We need to start today if we want to win.

Thank you,
Senate Republicans

name: Border Security Alerts
subject: Protect Trump's immigration agenda
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Blackburn Tennessee Victory Fund, a joint fundraising committee
body:
Our goal is to get 250 more signatures by midnight tonight! Please respond NOW and let Conservative leaders know you support all efforts to secure our southern border.

The Biden administration LIED to us this week when they claimed that there was NO CRISIS at our nation's southern border.

Dedicated patriots, like you, know this is not true! Illegal immigration is SURGING under the failed leadership of the Biden administration.

This can't continue...which is why we must know where you stand. body:
I lived the American Dream, and I want to help the next generation achieve the same.
****

.

[](http://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001yY70He7gVsOUZ0ymPzqXKLfrZiVXFqcSa0nhmUAiUipgPs6VpbaHpUAiQVFQwBFOqP6hd7bbC6iwPZqI0bcK5sz87mICInp1RAQza6SOOs5gwgbkmpCtricf8IbBui-A6nRsUMEx_Ovb2noQvF_ouP0TTyi99yWxyoXu3jlOpF5vWh-Q0YBE5sY6Z0rU_cv9wf6N6FkeK_3xp01B1skc3ddG0U0WMLpQzwdE1g5erVVoqj1In9DBAQ9LMesP4BVuGY-5HMZVXr2KMohUxUDIu1IQLR4T4hAOZ12HxCNQKgt731DZjgepQemuulb6We82arXG_xvrteEyQWcyw-Ki1Iq4ahXyPtt7HoBYGJRvje30GxNvD8O-6jW6e0h_vyiablboVuu5s7GA_C_LicPrkDy1wlk_FjczQH6Ha2g7uMQ=&c=EbPVcpK3_MqmCJ9rjBMcvSRFh090qINnaTkUJnS4NTVtUIAuFkzI4w==&ch=YI30TS-NPYaVA4f_2aiRPJ70c8VwltBVYNqbTbCzeeqMCxvC3xsI6Q==)
Friend, I was born in Korea, raised in Japan, and came to the United States with my single mother.

**My family and I are the story of the American Dream, and I know that we are not alone in the challenges we had to overcome to achieve our dreams.**

In America, it did not take long for the small businesses my mother started to be unfairly taxed by a broken system. After I saw my mother struggle with a tax bill because she did not have the resources to fight it, I decided enough was enough.

The failed policies the Democrats had enacted were wreaking havoc on the people of California: housing costs rising, homelessness, massive tax increases, and excessive red tape were destroying small businesses and the families who ran them.

Ever since then, it has been my mission to be California's taxpayer champion. So far, I have returned over $400 million to California taxpayers, working to stop new taxes, and object to any tax increases.

[**In Congress, I am keeping to this pledge and will continue to fight new taxes, but to do that, I need your help.**](http://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001yY70He7gVsOUZ0ymPzqXKLfrZiVXFqcSa0nhmUAiUipgPs6VpbaHpWGXPlvriQl9FbSUbUL488aZDjaHFNKdgMtTLZIVX3BmPhPnUy7lcL1mVkFiMGdGF9FbkSn3hIhDDbdywACAoocaL3qn_y7m05nM2YoERpoiOJ60tqymDFr9ALBQJZb4Yiq3xpumgcWHeKN0K9YU98pYFVQmjN-vlnKY1dLJ1iKKySeXFeFnFFZrvBpTauN3O5zm6wKUxxvqGOPs47urCfe9s35k0w2k4YSzQYtHk8oQSfXOyrJrv6ShP3DpbxEbf0NffN5Epa64kx8NbJ4llkjN8NVOa-DCqolQu2jbFQKnFkDSredYOzetG5Ob4kTfdY1VuiXAL_OGFN1fuUvqmO3266T83T3UYUe5BaltwsaoHOQFMlrnkds=&c=EbPVcpK3_MqmCJ9rjBMcvSRFh090qINnaTkUJnS4NTVtUIAuFkzI4w==&ch=YI30TS-NPYaVA4f_2aiRPJ70c8VwltBVYNqbTbCzeeqMCxvC3xsI6Q==)

I am so proud to represent this district as one of the first Korean-American women in Congress. I am so proud to fight for the small business owners and the taxpayers of California. [**Will you chip in even just $15 to give California taxpayers a voice in Washington?**](http://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001yY70He7gVsOUZ0ymPzqXKLfrZiVXFqcSa0nhmUAiUipgPs6VpbaHpQ5Hmmk6nqganETMzolhEnY5CQoDlk_iXTmguVcZRaa172rfHJB-rOkUAGWH7G0QkChnbsQWXOpJlNHwfddQr1v9PIaPRn-5pKrzTWRt7yzSV82BVO_jSCP2ZZSMFMh_xYMAdIR4M6XHeXFpnIJjzcn6DJ9n7jC7NRUFv48m0duyKRpQIVRkn_-oXbdU75cPx-MuPpgyy5vN23uL889uDJlusVIrtV5FFlR794TI_GyUY0XRGHh8l11skwMC9ruY_vujdmlzZ8gzoa5Qi4vza7wf985lyzpWYJT5MW3FiQgjhN93w5fA0qy-Ms8GtX4LskXKJKrUCCu1v4vzrkLinmS8ES68O9BcbeIpdzYl-qtnvT5HIlfAnTZVY5hqT-4rU8Xoh3RGDAga&c=EbPVcpK3_MqmCJ9rjBMcvSRFh090qINnaTkUJnS4NTVtUIAuFkzI4w==&ch=YI30TS-NPYaVA4f_2aiRPJ70c8VwltBVYNqbTbCzeeqMCxvC3xsI6Q==) | **[CHIP IN $15](http://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001yY70He7gVsOUZ0ymPzqXKLfrZiVXFqcSa0nhmUAiUipgPs6VpbaHpQ5Hmmk6nqga8KouC-ck7VyX5FkN5xNaYAybXtw_K1Niyz2IBcyzgZN-iypQd7z09xh_Yq4dCnERcEZ6TAlroa56ZYrZ3PuZfsw5qtnt7wmiCULfJmOTgoW7SIwQzUilFfmClevMbE5JVU0HJOtwSa5h1eaL16U0i84gOriXyD_rWChjwBsf9IpCOCULy4QGVQfHd_zZtRm6yfVe6jUzD9dAYui27mx1zLbzQPCdZ9E3rv_nBPRiRFYMgjHMDpQl01fMlwFlOuCRfphn8JF8Makjv9imp_pb2kLdPGhxg15d1jSjhWb2QWIuPNSURUSMCxklCbw0MxHjhxMZmRBLcU9vSZwIUy0LUEDTTC_Jvi4CsBq-I1Ij1CWBgFjhRi2qla9xu2HTCB1a&c=EbPVcpK3_MqmCJ9rjBMcvSRFh090qINnaTkUJnS4NTVtUIAuFkzI4w==&ch=YI30TS-NPYaVA4f_2aiRPJ70c8VwltBVYNqbTbCzeeqMCxvC3xsI6Q==)**

Because the margin for a Republican House Majority is so close right now, the far left has set their eyes on flipping this seat in 2022 from red to blue.

If the Democrats flip this seat or hold onto their majority, it will be that much easier for them to enact the failed socialist agenda in California on the rest of the country. With the support of grassroots conservative patriots like you, though, we can stop them in their tracks. [**Can I count on your support so we can find common sense solutions in Washington?**](http://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001yY70He7gVsOUZ0ymPzqXKLfrZiVXFqcSa0nhmUAiUipgPs6VpbaHpWGXPlvriQl9FbSUbUL488aZDjaHFNKdgMtTLZIVX3BmPhPnUy7lcL1mVkFiMGdGF9FbkSn3hIhDDbdywACAoocaL3qn_y7m05nM2YoERpoiOJ60tqymDFr9ALBQJZb4Yiq3xpumgcWHeKN0K9YU98pYFVQmjN-vlnKY1dLJ1iKKySeXFeFnFFZrvBpTauN3O5zm6wKUxxvqGOPs47urCfe9s35k0w2k4YSzQYtHk8oQSfXOyrJrv6ShP3DpbxEbf0NffN5Epa64kx8NbJ4llkjN8NVOa-DCqolQu2jbFQKnFkDSredYOzetG5Ob4kTfdY1VuiXAL_OGFN1fuUvqmO3266T83T3UYUe5BaltwsaoHOQFMlrnkds=&c=EbPVcpK3_MqmCJ9rjBMcvSRFh090qINnaTkUJnS4NTVtUIAuFkzI4w==&ch=YI30TS-NPYaVA4f_2aiRPJ70c8VwltBVYNqbTbCzeeqMCxvC3xsI6Q==)

**[CHIP IN ANY AMOUNT](http://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001yY70He7gVsOUZ0ymPzqXKLfrZiVXFqcSa0nhmUAiUipgPs6VpbaHpUAiQVFQwBFOqP6hd7bbC6iwPZqI0bcK5sz87mICInp1RAQza6SOOs5gwgbkmpCtricf8IbBui-A6nRsUMEx_Ovb2noQvF_ouP0TTyi99yWxyoXu3jlOpF5vWh-Q0YBE5sY6Z0rU_cv9wf6N6FkeK_3xp01B1skc3ddG0U0WMLpQzwdE1g5erVVoqj1In9DBAQ9LMesP4BVuGY-5HMZVXr2KMohUxUDIu1IQLR4T4hAOZ12HxCNQKgt731DZjgepQemuulb6We82arXG_xvrteEyQWcyw-Ki1Iq4ahXyPtt7HoBYGJRvje30GxNvD8O-6jW6e0h_vyiablboVuu5s7GA_C_LicPrkDy1wlk_FjczQH6Ha2g7uMQ=&c=EbPVcpK3_MqmCJ9rjBMcvSRFh090qINnaTkUJnS4NTVtUIAuFkzI4w==&ch=YI30TS-NPYaVA4f_2aiRPJ70c8VwltBVYNqbTbCzeeqMCxvC3xsI6Q==)**

We defeated Nancy Pelosi's handpicked candidate by several thousand votes last year. Next time around, they will spend even more - millions more - to flip this seat back to blue and implement their job-killing tax hikes. We simply cannot let this happen.

**With your support I know we can stop the Democrats and get this country back on track! **

Thank you,

Michelle Steel

With so much uncertainty right now, we know not everyone will be able to contribute. But even if you're unable to chip in right now, we could still use your help.

clean_body: I lived the American Dream, and I want to help the next generation achieve the same. ** . == Friend, I was born in Korea, raised in Japan, and came to the United States with my single mother. My family and I are the story of the American Dream, and I know that we are not alone in the challenges we had to overcome to achieve our dreams. In America, it did not take long for the small businesses my mother started to be unfairly taxed by a broken system. After I saw my mother struggle with a tax bill because she did not have the resources to fight it, I decided enough was enough. The failed policies the Democrats had enacted were wreaking havoc on the people of California: housing costs rising, homelessness, massive tax increases, and excessive red tape were destroying small businesses and the families who ran them. Ever since then, it has been my mission to be California's taxpayer champion. So far, I have returned over $400 million to California taxpayers, working to stop new taxes, and object to any tax increases. == I am so proud to represent this district as one of the first Korean-American women in Congress. I am so proud to fight for the small business owners and the taxpayers of California. == | == Because the margin for a Republican House Majority is so close right now, the far left has set their eyes on flipping this seat in 2022 from red to blue. If the Democrats flip this seat or hold onto their majority, it will be that much easier for them to enact the failed socialist agenda in California on the rest of the country. With the support of grassroots conservative patriots like you, though, we can stop them in their tracks. == == We defeated Nancy Pelosi's handpicked candidate by several thousand votes last year. Next time around, they will spend even more - millions more - to flip this seat back to blue and implement their job-killing tax hikes. We simply cannot let this happen. With your support I know we can stop the Democrats and get this country back on track! ** Thank you, Michelle Steel With so much uncertainty right now, we know not everyone will be able to contribute. But even if you're unable to chip in right now, we could still use your help. == Paid for by Michelle Steel for Congress P.O Box 472 Surfside, CA 90743== == == == == | | Michelle Steel for Congress | 8907 Warner Ave Suite 220, Huntington Beach, CA 92647 | | Sent by mailto:action@standupforliberty.net powered by

Another example of liberal elites making rules for other families but not theirs. **While schools in Berkeley have been shut down for close to a year, the Berkeley Federation of Teachers ' president gets to take his child to school.**

President Biden said his administration would "follow the science," yet the President continues to move the goalposts for returning children to school -- simply to cater to teachers' unions. It's time for children across the country to be back in classrooms.

My Senate Republican colleagues and I are working to make this happen, and we need your help. Will you chip in to help Cindy today?

name: Tim Scott
subject: A prop for diversity?
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY TIM SCOTT FOR SENATE
body:
I will be honest, very little these days surprises me. Unfortunately, I have become accustomed to hearing casual racism and insults from the "tolerant" Left. After all, I am a proud black Republican. But the other night, MSNBC host Joy Reid sunk to a new low, claiming I was only appearing at a press conference to give the illusion of diversity.
Friend,

I will be honest, very little these days surprises me.

Unfortunately, I have become accustomed to hearing casual racism and insults from the "tolerant" Left. _**After all, I am a proud black Republican.**_

But the other night, MSNBC host Joy Reid sunk to a new low, claiming I was only appearing at a press conference to give the illusion of diversity.

Check out her words for yourself:

[](https://secure.winred.com/tim-scott-for-senate/patina-of-diversity/?recurring=true&utm_campaign=20210304_TY.100609_tim-scott_t1050187-1260&utm_medium=emailp&utm_source=TY.100609&utm_content=20210304_a-prop-for-diversity)

A patina of diversity? Suffice it to say, these words are not by accident. This is the constant refrain from the so-called "tolerant" Left.

For a party and movement that claims to embrace diversity and tolerance, they sure seem to hate hearing my story or hearing my perspective.

Friend, when you hear these attacks against me don't get discouraged. **Get activated. Get Motivated. Get Involved.**
[STAND WITH ME](https://secure.winred.com/tim-scott-for-senate/patina-of-diversity/?recurring=true&utm_campaign=20210304_TY.100609_tim-scott_t1050187-1260&utm_medium=emailp&utm_source=TY.100609&utm_content=20210304_a-prop-for-diversity)
---
[**Chip in $25, $50, $75 or even $100 to send a strong message that we will not tolerate this type of insult from anyone --much less a host on MSNBC.**](https://secure.winred.com/tim-scott-for-senate/patina-of-diversity/?recurring=true&utm_campaign=20210304_TY.100609_tim-scott_t1050187-1260&utm_medium=emailp&utm_source=TY.100609&utm_content=20210304_a-prop-for-diversity)

This is a clear pattern from Democrats to discredit me and my conservative beliefs.

I refuse to back down and won't be silenced by their hatred. In fact, it only empowers me to keep fighting harder for our conservative values.

Friend, I need you to stand with me. This is not the first time I have faced attacks from the Left, and it certainly will not be the last.

[STAND WITH ME](https://secure.winred.com/tim-scott-for-senate/patina-of-diversity/?recurring=true&utm_campaign=20210304_TY.100609_tim-scott_t1050187-1260&utm_medium=emailp&utm_source=TY.100609&utm_content=20210304_a-prop-for-diversity)

clean_body: I will be honest, very little these days surprises me. Unfortunately, I have become accustomed to hearing casual racism and insults from the "tolerant" Left. After all, I am a proud black Republican. But the other night, MSNBC host Joy Reid sunk to a new low, claiming I was only appearing at a press conference to give the illusion of diversity. Friend, I will be honest, very little these days surprises me. Unfortunately, I have become accustomed to hearing casual racism and insults from the "tolerant" Left. After all, I am a proud black Republican. But the other night, MSNBC host Joy Reid sunk to a new low, claiming I was only appearing at a press conference to give the illusion of diversity. Check out her words for yourself: A patina of diversity? Suffice it to say, these words are not by accident. This is the constant refrain from the so-called "tolerant" Left. For a party and movement that claims to embrace diversity and tolerance, they sure seem to hate hearing my story or hearing my perspective. Friend, when you hear these attacks against me don't get discouraged. Get activated. Get Motivated. Get Involved. This is a clear pattern from Democrats to discredit me and my conservative beliefs. I refuse to back down and won't be silenced by their hatred. In fact, it only empowers me to keep fighting harder for our conservative values. Friend, I need you to stand with me. This is not the first time I have faced attacks from the Left, and it certainly will not be the last. | Patriot,
Liberals in D.C. are back to defunding our police. They said they wouldn't, but here we are.
We cannot accept this police bill because we depend on our first responders for the safety of our families. Nancy Pelosi and liberals in D.C. are trying to destroy law and order in America, but we can't go down without pushing back against this extreme measure.
Kat took the floor last night in support of our law enforcement officers with a powerful speech. As a first responder's wife, this hits close to home.

clean_body: Our Law Enforcement | | | | | | == | Patriot, Liberals in D.C. are back to defunding our police. They said they wouldn't, but here we are. We cannot accept this police bill because we depend on our first responders for the safety of our families. Nancy Pelosi and liberals in D.C. are trying to destroy law and order in America, but we can't go down without pushing back against this extreme measure. Kat took the floor last night in support of our law enforcement officers with a powerful speech. As a first responder's wife, this hits close to home. | == | == | | | == | We need to improve our policing tactics because it is absolutely necessary for our police to be held to the highest standards. The answer to America's law enforcement problem is not to defund the police, but to invest in a better-trained, more responsible police force that will be there when the American people call on them. == | | | == | | | == | | | == | | | == | | | == | For Florida, Team Cammack | | | | == | == == == | | Kat for Congress | 5200 NW 43rd Street, Suite 102-180, Gainesville, FL 32606 | | Sent by mailto:info@katforcongress.com

clean_body: Say NO to blue state bailouts! == == Friend, While the Democrats in D.C. are pushing funding to bailout FAILED blue states who ran their economies into the ground, Iowa is keeping the state open, our kids in school, and investing in the future. Governor Kim Reynolds led a balanced approach to the COVID-19 pandemic and kept 80% of Iowa's economy open. She was proud to place her trust in Iowans and now our state is coming back strong! But now, Iowa taxpayers are being forced to bail out states like New York and California... == == Help us send a message to President Biden, Nancy Pelosi, and Chuck Schumer in D.C. that we won't foot the bill for New York and California's mismanaged budgets and failed policies. Friend, do you believe that your tax dollars should go towards bailing out Governor Cuomo and Governor Newsom? == == Thank you, Team Reynolds Get involved with Team Reynolds Today! Team, this is urgent.
Republicans only need to flip ONE seat to take back the Senate. **CNN just released a report of the most likely seats to flip, and _Maggie is one of the most vulnerable Democrats._**
We can't show any signs of weakness when the stakes are this high. In 2016, Maggie won by only 1,017 votes -- and now our Senate majority hinges on our ability to raise funds for what could be the closest race in the country.

clean_body: New Hampshire one of the "most likely to flip" to GOP "" "" Team, this is urgent. Republicans only need to flip ONE seat to take back the Senate. CNN just released a report of the most likely seats to flip, and Maggie is one of the most vulnerable Democrats. We can't show any signs of weakness when the stakes are this high. In 2016, Maggie won by only 1,017 votes -- and now our Senate majority hinges on our ability to raise funds for what could be the closest race in the country. This race is getting more and more competitive by the day, but our fundraising has slowed in recent weeks. "" If you 've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately. "" "" "" "" Mitch McConnell is already hard at work to take out Maggie. McConnell's allies are already spending thousands of dollars in attack ads, and Mitch himself is recruiting his hand-picked choice for a GOP opponent. We need to get back on track ASAP and fight back against Republican attacks. "" Thank you for your help. -- Team Maggie ""

name: Team Fair Fight Action
subject: The House just passed HR 1! But the fight continues
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Fair Fight Action
body:
|
---
[](https://secure.fairfightaction.com/page/m/41efa377/34a064cc/1d91d01b/7025d8e/680357878/VEsH/?g=yzW-IFH8x8VbBlZb5iRRXGA "https://fairfight.com/")

| | Hello Friend - Because of your work, last night the U.S. House passed HR 1, titled _For The People Act_ , a sweeping package of democracy reforms that will protect and expand our voting rights in the face of voter suppression legislation coming out of the states. But the fight continues in the Senate. **Will you call your Senators today at 202-224-3121 and tell them to vote YES on the For the People Act (which will be referred to as S 1 in the Senate)?** Friend, Fair Fight Action's founder Stacey Abrams proudly testified in favor of this bill last week because of its critical expansion of access to the ballot. By making same day voter registration a nationwide opportunity, creating a 15-day minimum nationwide early vote period, allowing for national no-excuse absentee voting, and more, this bill makes sure our federal elections remain free and fair everywhere. And with [250+ bills](https://secure.fairfightaction.com/page/m/41efa377/34a064cc/1d91d01b/7025d8f/680357878/VEsE/?g=yzW-IFH8x8VbBlZb5iRRXGA "https://www.brennancenter.org/our-work/research-reports/voting-laws-roundup-february-2021") introduced in state legislatures across the country--aimed at making it harder for young voters and Black and brown voters to cast their ballots--we cannot afford to wait. Progress depends on the Senate passing S 1 now. Your Senators need to hear from _you_ that protecting our democracy is your priority! **Call the U.S. Capitol Switchboard at 202-224-3121 and ask to be connected to your Senators today.** Here is a **sample script** you can use for these calls: _Hi, my name is [Insert Name] and I am your constituent. I live in [City & State]. I am contacting you to ask you to support S 1 when it comes to the Senate. Every voter--regardless of zip code, race, ethnicity, or disability--should have the same access to the ballot box, and the For the People Act includes key reforms that make this possible. We can't wait to protect our democracy and I ask you to prioritize its passage._ Don't know who your Senators are? Click [**here**](https://secure.fairfightaction.com/page/m/41efa377/34a064cc/1d91d01b/7025d8c/680357878/VEsF/?g=yzW-IFH8x8VbBlZb5iRRXGA "https://www.senate.gov/senators/senators-contact.htm") to find out. Thank you for continuing to work hard to protect our democracy; let's get it done! \- Team Fair Fight Action |
---|---|---

|
---
[](https://secure.fairfightaction.com/page/m/41efa377/34a064cc/1d91d01b/7025d8d/680357878/VEsC/?g=yzW-IFH8x8VbBlZb5iRRXGA "https://www.facebook.com/FairFightAction/") [](https://secure.fairfightaction.com/page/m/41efa377/34a064cc/1d91d01b/7025d8a/680357878/VEsD/?g=yzW-IFH8x8VbBlZb5iRRXGA "https://twitter.com/fairfightaction/") [](https://secure.fairfightaction.com/page/m/41efa377/34a064cc/1d91d01b/7025d8b/680357878/VEsA/?g=yzW-IFH8x8VbBlZb5iRRXGA "https://www.instagram.com/fairfightaction/")

[](http://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001HgIljD15ygEJRJlrEqc-BAZWHuzEQIGDKsqCFvzSSp8vHOzcmFZ5rq3IB_OBc8ktRKyXv9wAd84rv-IdptKH0E-yMQEhqgMIt1TubfWO5am8g6fNixTBcgCjuZWHJBbaRw-_SX0WyMzfj5slf9p89rb8tFfeUQMfrP3E6CdKFo2VY8jJn9N6Vw3TPWWsaqq1H_digcjb_uOmpdcPezIm2gK_WbMY8dzvKEAyH7PrG1xB3rdgR-ZDy4zq9Fu1zh0461BBvV6uBYCiuqXOKLDCvHRmR_5aatFA1tBYmvkmv0WIDF4xe0UWY-GXu2C0RZYBg29peH_IELRODNUahnMuN7r6sQ6DlaY9sGt1Qlwbvz17z0oYID0zTNQo3f3mrwjH9dmgIpC41dtUFA4yI4GTDve_KoVefxCPvD1ozOZJSrooJreTZGU5hE1yI8qOhZqK-W6sqT5bVDwh_VwdUBf8L_7oPKFbA8iC&c=6uKJSuvOlZkrDIrIp_AZ1_tJtiR7eocnel_5H39w6u3QQB-g8C6ViA==&ch=h0aoipCYYO_hVQ5JUSFf1A2dOdVt99MshcyzUNzpXN9MAWXcFyuqYA==)
The Radical Left is out in FULL FORCE to try and CANCEL me over having proudly served President Trump as his White House Physician. **Yesterday 's politically motivated "report" was a BLATANT disregard for the TRUTH. The accusations against me are FALSE, and they're coming because I stand FIRM in my support for President Trump and his America First agenda. ** **Far-left extremists won 't rest until they've destroyed our Anthem, our Flag, our Churches, and every traditional American value that we have -- and if they had the chance, the Left will come after YOU without any hesitation. ** I need your help to FIGHT BACK. I'm ACTIVATING 500% MATCHING to make sure that I have the funds to defend myself against these most recent Democrat lies. subject: Pelosi is Trying to Stifle your Speech and Take Over your Elections!
body:
The last thing America needs is a bill to silence your voice and further empower one-party rule in Washington, D.C. | | | [View this email in your browser](https://mailchi.mp/43eb6105aaf0/pssst-we-know-how-to-stop-the-pelosibiden-agenda-670985?e=24057c0240)
---
|
---
Dear Peter:Today, [I stood strong with 20 of my attorneys general colleagues and opposed the Pelosi power grab — HR 1.](https://patrickmorrisey.us10.list-manage.com/track/click?u=7c58654388ec83b4612750ef7&id=cb290b15a6&e=24057c0240)The last thing America needs is a bill to **SILENCE YOUR VOICE** and further **EMPOWER ONE-PARTY RULE** in Washington, D.C.This [“monstrosity of a bill”](https://patrickmorrisey.us10.list-manage.com/track/click?u=7c58654388ec83b4612750ef7&id=c9204c06c8&e=24057c0240) does the following:
* **Mandate mail-in voting**
* **Require states to accept late ballots**
* **Allow unelected commissions to determine redistricting**
* **Allow the federal government to override a state’s voter identification laws**
* **Restrict free speech**

**I WILL FILE A LAWSUIT** against this **PELOSI NIGHTMARE** if she manages to get this anti-First Amendment bill through Congress.But right now, we need your help. I’m getting attacked by **PELOSI CRONIES** who want to **DISBAR AND IMPEACH ME.** Peter, would you donate $35 to help Defend America and support our efforts?
[](https://patrickmorrisey.us10.list-manage.com/track/click?u=7c58654388ec83b4612750ef7&id=9f01a3edf0&e=24057c0240)
**I HAVE FOUGHT FOR INTEGRITY** at the ballot box and for your First Amendment rights. Now Team Morrisey needs your help.Generous donors will match your donations if you donate today.**Can we count on you, Peter?**
| [Donate $100 = $200 IMPACT](https://patrickmorrisey.us10.list-manage.com/track/click?u=7c58654388ec83b4612750ef7&id=e3414cd620&e=24057c0240)

subject: Continuing the American Legacy
body:
It’s time to take action
---
| | | | | | [ ](http://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=0018gq3BxeEbPWV39OIDEpLV6eNRH0-BHNHZwtiuKCYxo35n7jNPJAyjL_vgq3tfvCHevMrgZ01dpz_P4p6uJXpPUEqiVL788hn0gTRvmGKdvkYd1Su4XhfWNepGXBDvfd30PaaxUBo3g2BtLJWdK6OIeykzF105QvdL0Lvzgg2EhE=&c=8aNSAonxYhbrPRoQTwbSsjzU2ZGm7qVSqGa2lLHL7H-ycg3-04YGGA==&ch=FzX-dVZVihzOZ41VH6N7f9reQLK-km2GJghCzrm1PcwFuej91P-VlA==)

| Patriot,
This year's Conservative Political Action Conference, hosted in the great state of Florida, was a bombshell of an event. Former President Trump took center stage and reminded the American people that the American First movement is strong.
I joined Fox News' John Roberts and had a productive conversation about putting America First and holding Congress accountable to the American people. You can check it out below!

| [ ](http://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=0018gq3BxeEbPWV39OIDEpLV6eNRH0-BHNHZwtiuKCYxo35n7jNPJAyjL_vgq3tfvCHevMrgZ01dpz_P4p6uJXpPUEqiVL788hn0gTRvmGKdvkYd1Su4XhfWNepGXBDvfd30PaaxUBo3g2BtLJWdK6OIeykzF105QvdL0Lvzgg2EhE=&c=8aNSAonxYhbrPRoQTwbSsjzU2ZGm7qVSqGa2lLHL7H-ycg3-04YGGA==&ch=FzX-dVZVihzOZ41VH6N7f9reQLK-km2GJghCzrm1PcwFuej91P-VlA==)

---
| The Biden administration and the far-left are pushing the most radical agenda in decades. Their radical policies are anti-jobs, anti-families, anti-border, anti-energy, anti-guns, and anti-common sense. They want to put America last, but the conservative movement will always put America First!
Here in Florida, agriculture is king, which means it is my priority to ensure that our local businesses are not taken advantage of by the globalists in Congress that would prefer we import our agricultural goods. Food security is national security, and ensuring Americans have the access to the food they need is just one way I'm putting America First.
---

| [ ](http://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=0018gq3BxeEbPWV39OIDEpLV6eNRH0-BHNHZwtiuKCYxo35n7jNPJAyjL_vgq3tfvCHevMrgZ01dpz_P4p6uJXpPUEqiVL788hn0gTRvmGKdvkYd1Su4XhfWNepGXBDvfd30PaaxUBo3g2BtLJWdK6OIeykzF105QvdL0Lvzgg2EhE=&c=8aNSAonxYhbrPRoQTwbSsjzU2ZGm7qVSqGa2lLHL7H-ycg3-04YGGA==&ch=FzX-dVZVihzOZ41VH6N7f9reQLK-km2GJghCzrm1PcwFuej91P-VlA==)

| Just as Former President Trump said, "The mission of our movement and of the Republican party must be to create a future of good jobs, strong families, safe communities, a vibrant culture, and a great nation for all Americans, and that's what we're creating."
The America First agenda is strong, and we will continue to prioritize improving the lives of American citizens. It is our priority to ensure that American interests are the focus of our decision-making. name: Judicial Watch Corruption Chronicles
subject: Nearly 2 Million Airport Workers May Pose Security Threat as U.S. Studies Cost of Screening Them
body:
A provision of the law requires TSA to produce a study within one year determining the cost and feasibility of implementing enhanced airport worker inspection measures at all access points between non-secured and security-restricted areas at a significant number of airports.

---
| | | Because no one is above the law! | March 04, 2021
---|---|---
| | [](https://myjw.pr.judicialwatch.org/wta/link.php?AGENCY=jw&M=27089954&N=53068&L=22287&F=H&)

# [Nearly 2 Million Airport Workers May Pose Security Threat as U.S. Studies Cost of Screening Them](https://myjw.pr.judicialwatch.org/wta/link.php?AGENCY=jw&M=27089954&N=53068&L=22287&F=H&)
Nearly 2 million workers with unescorted access to security restricted areas at airports throughout the U.S. could pose an “insider threat,” according to a new federal audit, yet the government is still studying how to effectively curb the risk. Congress has tasked the famously inefficient Transportation Security Administration (TSA), created after the 9/11 terrorist attacks to protect the nation’s transportation system, with submitting a plan examining the cost and feasibility of enhanced worker screening measures at American airports, but it seems that the agency cannot handle the task. The assignment was embedded in a 2018 law, TSA Modernization Act, that aims to improve the agency’s screening technologies, streamline its passenger screening process and mandate more rigorous background checks of airport workers, among other things.
[Read More](https://myjw.pr.judicialwatch.org/wta/link.php?AGENCY=jw&M=27089954&N=53068&L=22287&F=H&)

The brief argues that mandatory disclosure of donors leads to intimidation, harassment and threats or reprisals from government officials and private parties that could chill the exercise of First Amendment rights. | CLIPS | | | | | | Keep our investigators on the job uncovering the truth: | = | | | | ---|---|--- = = = Judicial Watch, Inc. 425 3rd St Sw Ste 800, Washington, DC 20024 202.646.5172 (C)2017-2021, All Rights Reserved = |

| | Friend - Right now, SB 241, one of the worst anti-voting bills in the nation, is still advancing in Georgia's Senate. This bill, pushed by Mike Dugan and Georgia Republicans, would:
* Repeal no-excuse vote by mail, which was used by over 1.3 million Georgians in 2020
* Create a new "fraud" hotline that would result in voter intimidation and prosecution
* Add ID provisions that could be a burden to over 200,000 Georgians
* Cost counties and taxpayers over $28 million in the next election cycle alone

We need your help to stop SB 241 and stand up for voting rights in Georgia. Here's what you can do right now: **Call and email these Senators to demand they vote NO on SB 241:** Max Burns: (404) 656-7586, max.burns@senate.ga.gov

name: Giffords.org
subject: It has been a long, difficult effort
body:
Our greatest opportunity to change our gun laws is right in front of us.
#

$3.
If you knew $3 could save a life from gun violence, wouldn't you immediately give it?
If you knew that $3 could keep a woman from being threatened with a gun by her domestic abuser, wouldn't you contribute it?
If you knew that just $3 would mean anyone who wanted to buy a gun would have to pass a background check first, wouldn't you donate it?
Well, friends, now we have a new president and new opportunities to make our communities safer from gun violence.
Gabby and the Giffords organization will be leading that fight, but we can't do it alone. So we're asking:
**[Can you make a $3 contribution to Giffords PAC TODAY before the end of our 72-hour Fundraising drive comes to a close?](https://action.giffords.org/page/m/385ee1f7/78fba3aa/60ed86ee/50aad1f7/404740951/VEsH/p/eyJlM3R5WldaamIyUmxmWDA9IjoiZW0yMTAzMDQtMi1udGwifQ%3D%3D/?g=VoprG3y8bT5gPy-pvV0V7pA "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/giffords-em-march-21?refcode=em210304-2-ntl")**
It has been a long, difficult effort to get to this moment, but our greatest opportunity for change is right in front of us. But taking on the gun lobby won't be easy, that's why your donation, especially today, means so much.
All our best,
The team at Giffords
**[CONTRIBUTE](https://action.giffords.org/page/m/385ee1f7/78fba3aa/60ed86ee/50aad1f7/404740951/VEsE/p/eyJlM3R5WldaamIyUmxmWDA9IjoiZW0yMTAzMDQtMi1udGwifQ%3D%3D/?g=VoprG3y8bT5gPy-pvV0V7pA "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/giffords-em-march-21?refcode=em210304-2-ntl")**

* * *
This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. We try to send only the most important information and opportunities to participate via email, but click [here](https://action.giffords.org/page/m/385ee1f7/78fba3aa/60ed86ee/50aad1f6/404740951/VEsF/?g=VoprG3y8bT5gPy-pvV0V7pA "http://action.americansforresponsiblesolutions.org/page/unsubscribe") if you'd like to unsubscribe. Giffords PAC was started to support elected officials who step up to fight the gun violence epidemic. Thank you for standing with Gabby and Mark.

Hoosier Republican,

The Democrats are currently trying to take full advantage of their majority in Washington by ramming a $1.9 TRILLION bill through without the bipartisan input they told the American people they would seek. Disguised as a COVID “relief” bill, this piece of legislation is loaded with pet projects of the radical left!

This bill does far too little to help small businesses and families, and instead funnels taxpayer funds to bailout Democrat cities, pays off teachers’ unions, and even funds abortions.

It actively punishes states like Indiana that entered the pandemic with balanced budgets and strong economies.

Hoosiers have worked HARD to get where we are as a state, and now Nancy Pelosi, Chuck Schumer, and Joe Biden want to punish us for our strong fiscal position.

We need to push back on this boondoggle of a bill, and we need to do it now, before it can pass the Senate.

Please RUSH an emergency contribution right now to help us fight back and protect Indiana from fiscal insanity!
RUSH A DONATION NOW >> (https://secure.winred.com/indiana-republican-party/e-covid-relief-bill-030421?utm_source=HouseFile&utm_campaign=ingop&utm_medium=Email&utm_content=e_covid_relief_bill_030421&utm_agency=alpha&mc_cid=cc8700b9a7&mc_eid=UNIQID)

It is more important than ever that we use every resource we can to push back against the Democrats and their insane proposals. Hoosiers are still trying to recover from the pandemic, and bills like this will place an unfair burden on our great state.

Fight back by chipping in what you can right now. We need the resources to fight back against the socialists in Washington and protect Indiana!

Thanks for your help,
Team Indiana GOP

name: Bobby Jindal
subject: Whom should Republicans fight?
body:
Facing a pandemic with historic health and economic consequences, a rising China, and domestic strife over rapidly changing race and gender norms, [](http://links.americanxt.com/u/click?_t=45ea7b9dcedb45198104e7ca02a78270&_m=4ef5509c92534ba98b4d5101e5140622&_e=ItnC7zARDEKQqzMcE9pdSntuSFaLq3cOMyFWrYtl_I2E9iMlO5HRP771cjAS6qFXhxoXLt3vanjtBO9jAJo_bzYgiH20OTErH-w2r3rQ_2PsTGo5SXZKjJJWhYQBK1YXhS2zCBEAvvI4f1f8ZIG4vw_MSlm1_bNxKVW_AHgnzjkmbsoxgaHQXyn1EITZ4F8KMBvEOkt3GeTMnRf86bP-L0pXSHvaoX5U3Y8jRSiVi0N8aFUXN4cIdA_kp1vmkVHbMNMj4sbhpjf4uU3J1mWztw%3D%3D) | |
---
**Whom should Republicans fight?**
|
---
Facing a pandemic with historic health and economic consequences, a rising China, and domestic strife over rapidly changing race and gender norms, voters of all ideological backgrounds are looking for political leaders ready to fight for them.

Despite President Biden’s superficial calls for unity and bipartisan deal-making, his administration is already pushing the nation’s environmental, tax, spending, and regulatory policies sharply to the left. Biden is doing so via executive actions, legislation that can be passed on a party-line vote through the reconciliation process, and liberal appointments. Democratic voters see their party's control over the White House and Congress and are demanding aggressive action. They have been agitated by a steady diet of grievances fed to them by a media convinced that Donald Trump posed an existential threat to American norms and democracy itself.

In turn, Republican voters are increasingly alarmed by the radical policies coming from Washington and their sudden loss of power. Rising Republican leaders, especially those looking to the next presidential election, must demonstrate to these voters they are ready and willing to fight for them. Unlike elections not so long ago, when George H.W. Bush promised a "kinder, gentler nation," George W. Bush promised "compassionate conservatism," and Bill Clinton promised to invest the "peace dividend," today’s voters are looking for political warriors. America is no longer the world’s sole undisputed superpower. Today, peace abroad and prosperity at home do not seem as assured.

...

_Read the full article**[here](http://links.americanxt.com/u/click?_t=45ea7b9dcedb45198104e7ca02a78270&_m=4ef5509c92534ba98b4d5101e5140622&_e=ItnC7zARDEKQqzMcE9pdShjjY-NRp5KYYOs3nyJKk87ab44RrFxHVhA8FKEUaOR5SbGpFp23XsmEbgYrKmS8LLvWdwIEipZ3pgVcRrHB19FNzs5MfhJvvzphqBH9TJ0BOFdedebiP2lbePyGsEp-h5EkgfCQ5dnGd40Wg4j9U4XQqWpVfrWX8FDxxqAB-LZkTrvx7CPh9ORXRCCeQVkyxZ327OqTFWOivs70xeBfhxoa_tIaPOflqc2nPhw4GRnDsbsnZMcswQndypQaWYrbPmwBPEVWRlCMbnD4FpLI9UkMc68ZSgLGea8ge5DJkUbh00BrJX0HvckfXvYjAkD17Q%3D%3D)**._
